title: lobelia brevifolia
intro: Lobelia brevifolia, also known as Blue Lobelia or Kamokila, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, native to Hawaii. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the nervous system and aid in the removal of mucus. The health benefits of Lobelia brevifolia include its potential to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Lobelia brevifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
